emails.subject: RE: Vector Pipeline
emails.body: RE: Vector Pipeline looks good. what are vector's major receipt and delivery points

emails.subject: RE: Vector Pipeline
emails.body: Receipt point: Dawn (Ontario) Delivery points: Chicago LDC's (Illinois), ANR ML7 (Wisconsin), Mich.-Consum. Energy (MIchigan) Competing pipelines: ANR, Panhandle Eastern, NGPL, Trunkline

emails.subject: RE: Vector Pipeline
emails.body: RE: Vector Pipeline Thanks, are we talking to GreatLakes pipepline as well

emails.subject: RE: Vector Pipeline
emails.body: I have a call in to Great Lakes and will know more tomorrow morning. My contact, Art Edmunds, is out until tomorrow. I'll let you know. To: Carter, Carl
